workspace_files.name: README.md
workspace_files.content:
# Welcome to KatanA

A native Markdown workspace.

## Features

- Live split-view preview
- Diagram rendering (Mermaid, PlantUML, Draw.io)
- Tab-based multi-document editing
- Full i18n (EN / JA)

workspace_files.name: diagrams.md
workspace_files.content:
# Diagrams

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Write Markdown] --> B[Live Preview]
    B --> C[Export]
```
